# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 07 — Optimization Layer (RMD v1.0)

## Objective

Transform the portfolio into a production-grade platform that remains fast, accessible, discoverable, and maintainable while supporting advanced interactions.

Optimization is a feature.

Performance is part of UX.

---

# Optimization Philosophy

Every feature must justify:

- Performance Cost
- Accessibility Cost
- Maintenance Cost
- Complexity Cost

If value does not exceed cost, remove it.

---

# Success Metrics

## Lighthouse

Performance >= 95

Accessibility >= 100

Best Practices >= 100

SEO >= 100

---

## Core Web Vitals

LCP < 2.0s

INP < 200ms

CLS < 0.05

---

## Bundle Targets

Initial JS < 100KB

Critical CSS < 30KB

Largest Image < 250KB

---

# Sprint OP1 — Performance Budget System

## Goal

Create measurable limits.

### Budgets

JavaScript

CSS

Images

Fonts

Animations

SVG Assets

---

### Rule

No feature may be added without budget review.

---

# Sprint OP2 — Astro Optimization

## Goal

Maximize Astro benefits.

### Rules

Astro First

Static First

SSR Only When Needed

Hydrate Only Interactive Islands

---

### Audit Targets

Pages

Layouts

Components

Vue Islands

---

# Sprint OP3 — Island Hydration Audit

## Goal

Reduce client-side JavaScript.

### Review

Hero

Command Palette

Visitor Globe

Search

Theme Switcher

Language Switcher

---

### Preferred Hydration

client:visible

client:idle

client:media

---

### Avoid

client:load everywhere

---

# Sprint OP4 — Asset Optimization

## Goal

Optimize all media.

### Images

Use Astro Image.

Use AVIF.

Use WebP fallback.

---

### SVG

Optimize with SVGO.

Remove unnecessary metadata.

---

### Videos

Lazy load.

Poster image required.

---

# Sprint OP5 — Typography Optimization

## Goal

Reduce font overhead.

### Strategy

Self-host fonts.

Subset fonts.

Use variable fonts.

---

### Rules

Maximum 2 font families.

Maximum 1 variable font preferred.

---

# Sprint OP6 — Motion Optimization

## Goal

Keep motion performant.

### Rules

Transform

Opacity

Filter (minimal)

---

### Avoid

Layout Thrashing

Heavy Box Shadows

Expensive Paints

---

### Monitoring

60fps target.

16ms frame budget.

---

# Sprint OP7 — Search Optimization

## Goal

Fast command palette and search.

### Search Index

Build Time Generated

Static JSON

Fuse.js

---

### Targets

Search Open <100ms

Search Result <50ms

---

# Sprint OP8 — SEO Optimization

## Goal

Maximize discoverability.

### Technical SEO

Sitemap

Robots

Canonical URLs

Open Graph

Twitter Cards

Structured Data

---

### Content SEO

Projects

Case Studies

Notes

Certificates

---

# Sprint OP9 — Structured Data Layer

## Goal

Improve search understanding.

### Schemas

Person

WebSite

BreadcrumbList

Article

CreativeWork

Project

---

### Rule

JSON-LD preferred.

---

# Sprint OP10 — Accessibility Optimization

## Goal

Reach WCAG AA or higher.

### Audit Areas

Keyboard Navigation

Focus States

Contrast

Screen Readers

ARIA Labels

Forms

---

### Requirements

Command Palette Accessible

Visitor Globe Accessible

Theme Switch Accessible

---

# Sprint OP11 — Internationalization Optimization

## Goal

Ensure bilingual support remains scalable.

### Requirements

Localized URLs

Localized Metadata

Localized Open Graph

Localized Sitemap

---

# Sprint OP12 — Caching Strategy

## Goal

Reduce repeat load cost.

### Cache Layers

Cloudflare Edge

Static Assets

Images

Fonts

Search Index

---

### Rules

Immutable Assets

Long Cache TTL

Versioned Builds

---

# Sprint OP13 — Analytics Optimization

## Goal

Track meaningful usage.

### Metrics

Page Views

Case Study Views

Resume Downloads

Contact Clicks

Project Views

---

### Avoid

Vanity Metrics

---

# Sprint OP14 — Security Hardening

## Goal

Protect portfolio infrastructure.

### Headers

CSP

HSTS

X-Frame-Options

Referrer-Policy

Permissions-Policy

---

### Review Areas

Forms

Analytics

Third Party Scripts

---

# Sprint OP15 — Technical Debt Management

## Goal

Prevent long-term degradation.

### Monthly Review

Unused Components

Unused CSS

Unused Assets

Large Bundles

Duplicate Logic

---

# Monitoring Dashboard

## Weekly Review

Lighthouse

Core Web Vitals

Search Performance

Accessibility Score

Bundle Size

---

# AI Agent Rules

Rule OP-01

Performance before aesthetics.

Rule OP-02

Astro before Vue.

Rule OP-03

SVG before PNG.

Rule OP-04

Optimize before adding features.

Rule OP-05

Every new dependency requires justification.

Rule OP-06

Every animation must respect performance budgets.

Rule OP-07

Accessibility is mandatory.

---

# Definition of Done

- Lighthouse targets achieved.
- Core Web Vitals achieved.
- Asset pipeline optimized.
- Search optimized.
- SEO optimized.
- Accessibility validated.
- Caching strategy implemented.
- Analytics optimized.
- Security headers configured.
- Technical debt process established.

---

# Next Layer

08-launch-layer.rmd
